title: Puppeteer server via pinned docker image with an env flag is SAFE

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/puppeteer/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: A browser-automation server in a pinned container with only a non-secret DOCKER_CONTAINER env flag exposes no credentials or host shell; it is a clean baseline.
knownLimitations: Browser automation can still reach arbitrary URLs at runtime; static config cannot bound that.
